title: Sanjay Chakrabarty | NexusNow.ai
heading: Sanjay Chakrabarty is the Chairman & Founder of Nexusnow.ai, bringing decades of experience in the technology sector - from startups to scaling businesses globally. Under his leadership, Nexusnow.ai is committed to delivering next-generation AI-driven solutions that redefine business transformation across industries. Sanjay is the Founder & Managing Partner of Capital Square Partners (“CSP”), a technology and business services focused private equity fund manager based and regulated in Singapore. CSP has done investments of over $3 billion, including debt and equity, over the last decade. He led the buyout of CSS Corp (from Partners Group) in 2021, which has since been rebranded to Movate Inc. (www.movate.com), where he serves as Chairman of the Board. Sanjay is also a Director on the Board of Startek (www.startek.com), Relevance Lab (www.relevancelab.com), and Bits in Glass (www.bitsinglass.com), which are current portfolio companies of CSP. He was also a Board member and led CSP’s investment into Indecomm (exited to Warburg Pincus in 2019), Minacs (exited to Concentrix in 2016), and Aegis Holdings (merged with Startek in 2018), among others. Prior to founding CSP, Sanjay was the President and Venture Partner at Columbia Capital, overseeing investments in India and Southeast Asia. He also previously founded and served as CEO of MobiApps Holdings, a technology company focused on satellite communication products including building a patent protected RF ASIC semiconductor chip. He successfully led MobiApps from inception to a strategic exit, including creating a joint venture with TATA Autocomp Systems. Earlier in his career, Sanjay worked as a management consultant at Arthur D. Little in Washington, DC, and Singapore, specializing in Telecommunications, Technology, and Energy sectors. Sanjay holds an MBA from Carnegie Mellon University, where he received the Danforth fellowship, and dual Bachelor of Science degrees in Computer Engineering and Mathematics from Pennsylvania State University at Slippery Rock. He is also an avid musiciantrained in Indian classical music, and performs regularly on the Sarod.

title: Bhaskar Das | NexusNow.ai
heading: Bhaskar Ranjan Das is the Chief Operating Officer of NexusNow.ai, bringing over three decades of rich experience in establishing business operations, strategic growth, and relationship management across various industries. Bhaskar has held leadership positions across multiple domains, including IT, eLearning, and consulting, driving success through strategic business development and operational excellence. Throughout his career, Bhaskar has been instrumental in growing new businesses for established organizations and leading startups from inception. He has held key roles at the Association of International Certified Professional Accountants, Realization Technologies, Manipal Universal Learning, and Universitas 21 Global, demonstrating his ability to build and manage both large multifunctional teams and small startup units. His diverse background gives him a unique perspective on transforming traditional businesses with innovative technology solutions and market expansion strategies. In his role at NexusNow.ai, Bhaskar is responsible for overseeing the company's operational strategy, focusing on the development and delivery of AI-powered transformation projects. He is passionate about leveraging his skills in strategic partnerships, business insights, and digital transformation to optimize processes and drive growth. title: Jayanta Lahiri | NexusNow.ai
heading: Jayanta Lahiri brings over 30 years of global experience in technology, outsourcing, and consulting. As the CEO and co-founder of NexusNow.ai, Jayanta drives strategic growth through AI-driven technology solutions and digital transformations. His career has spanned diverse roles, including leading large-scale technology operations, spearheading digital transformation initiatives, and establishing technology strategies across multiple industries. Jayanta has held prominent leadership roles at some of the world’s leading organizations, such as Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, AXA Technologies, Firstsource, and Startek. In these roles, he played a pivotal role in managing digital transformation, multi-cloud infrastructure, application modernization, AI, analytics, and cybersecurity, ensuring that technology investments align with business growth and innovation. His expertise lies in harnessing the power of Generative AI, advanced analytics, customer experience, automation, and cybersecurity to empower enterprises in their digital transformation journey. Jayanta’s experience extends across Banking, Insurance, Manufacturing, Retail, Telecom, Healthcare, Oil & Gas, and E-commerce sectors, among others, focusing on creating innovative solutions that drive business resilience and success. Jayanta is known for his advisory and transformation capabilities, having led multiple consulting engagements for Fortune 500 clients globally. He has successfully transformed enterprise IT landscapes, enabled strategic roadmaps, and guided organizations through AI adoption and cloud migration, emphasizing operational excellence and innovation. Under his leadership, NexusNow.ai aims to be at the forefront of AI-driven transformation, delivering industry-leading ServiceNow solutions, intelligent automation, and scalable AI-driven workflows to clients worldwide.

title: Jyotin Gambhir  | NexusNow.ai
heading: Jyotin Gambhir is an accomplished cybersecurity leader with over 25 years of experience delivering enterprise-grade security solutions for businesses across multiple industries. As the US GEO Head at NexusNow.ai, he drives AI-powered ServiceNow deployments in ITSM, CRM, Legalflow, and GRC modules, optimizing processes and generating measurable ROI. Previously, Jyotin served as Managing Partner & CISO at Ockham Corp (2021–2023), providing cybersecurity services to enterprise clients, addressing governance, strategy, compliance, and integration of security processes and technologies. He was also Managing Director at SecureFLO, leading penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, IoT and cloud security, and regulatory compliance projects for standards like SOX, HIPAA, FISMA, SSAE18 SOC2, CMMC, and GDPR. His earlier roles include Cybersecurity Lead at CIOAdvisory.ai, Manager – Audit & Enterprise Risk Services at Deloitte, Senior Sales Engineer at IBM, Senior Software Consultant & Sales Engineer at BMC Software, and Sales & Marketing Manager at Infinite Possibilities. He has also served as a Board Member at New England ISC2. Jyotin holds an MBA in International Business from the University of Tampa and a BBA in Business Administration and Computer Science from MIU, and is recognized as an Honored Listed by Marquis Who’s Who. His expertise combines strategic leadership, advanced cybersecurity, and innovative AI adoption to safeguard enterprise operations while enabling scalable digital transformation.

title: Publius Paul | NexusNow.ai
heading: Publius Paul is the Delivery Lead at NexusNow.ai, bringing over two decades of experience in IT service delivery, infrastructure management, and project leadership. Publius is passionate about driving large teams towards operational excellence and embracing a changing technology landscape to enhance customer satisfaction and business outcomes. Throughout his career, Publius has been instrumental in leading complex IT infrastructure projects, managing end-to-end service delivery, and ensuring that IT services align seamlessly with strategic business objectives. He has held key leadership positions at renowned organizations such as Accenture, AXA Tech, Cable & Wireless, and IBM. In these roles, he played a critical role in delivering transformative IT services, managing infrastructure operations, and steering large-scale transitions and migrations for global clients. At NexusNow.ai, Publius oversees the successful execution of IT and AI-driven transformation projects, ensuring seamless service delivery for our clients. He specializes in issue management, infrastructure management, data center operations, and project governance, ensuring adherence to industry best practices and standards. His expertise in managing multi-functional teams and driving productivity through efficient resource planning and technical direction is central to NexusNow.ai's mission of delivering high-quality solutions. Publius’s experience includes leading infrastructure teams across various domains, such as server administration, network management, and service desk operations, and implementing best-in-class service standards. His leadership has contributed to building strong client relationships, managing complex deals, and delivering tailored solutions that align with business needs. As Delivery Lead, Publius is committed to driving service excellence, fostering teamwork, and ensuring that NexusNow.ai consistently exceeds client expectations while delivering innovative and reliable IT solutions.
